about.title: About Bettery Ration
about.subtitle: We create healthy food that inspires
about.storyText: Bettery Ration is a healthy eating service created by a team of like-minded people. We believe that proper nutrition can be delicious, affordable, and convenient. Every dish is developed by professional dietitians and chefs.
about.missionText: Making healthy food accessible to everyone. We use only fresh, natural ingredients and cook with care for your health.
